# Weekly Status Template

Use this template for concise delivery updates. Keep it under one page.

## Subject

```text
University Data Platform - Week <N> Status
```

## Body

```text
Hi <Manager name>,

Week <N> summary below.

COMPLETED THIS WEEK
- <Specific completed deliverable with measurable result>
- <Second completed deliverable>
- <Third completed deliverable>

IN PROGRESS
- <Current item and percent complete if useful>
- <Second current item>

NEXT WEEK PLAN
- <Specific planned deliverable>
- <Second planned deliverable>

BLOCKERS OR DECISIONS NEEDED
- <Specific decision, owner, and needed date>
- If none: No blockers this week.

METRICS THIS WEEK
- Pipeline runs: <X> successful / <Y> failed
- DQ checks: <X> passing / <Y> warnings / <Z> failures
- Rows processed: <X> Bronze / <Y> Silver / <Z> Gold
- Quality score: <X>%

Regards,
<Name>
```

## Writing Rules

- Use numbers where possible.
- Name blocker owners.
- Include next steps before being asked.
- Keep risks visible.
- Avoid vague statements such as "worked on pipelines".
